concerns.source_pdf_quote: Two new benefits will be available soon on the NCSFA web site for members. One is a Long Term Care option that allows members to select a long term care protection for themselves or their spouses. The other is a Legal Shield program that members can purchase that has two offerings; one is a prepaid legal service and the other is an ID protection option. Look for these soon. Questions?
